title: Fix: class assignment to virtual interface not propagating

features.name: class with virtual interface task writing to interface signal
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface member and a task/function that writes to the interface signal

features.name: module assign statements connecting physical interfaces
features.description: Code should include module-level assign statements that connect physical interface signals to module signals
features.snippet:
assign intf_read.data = data;
assign data = intf_write.data;

features.name: virtual interface assignment and class instantiation
features.description: Code should include virtual interface variables being assigned and passed to class constructors
